'''''Star Wars Tales'' 13''' is the thirteenth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' series of comics. It was published on [[September 25]], [[2002]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

==Publisher's summary==
''He's bald. He's bad. His lightsaber is purple. He's MACE WINDU! Make sure not to miss out on this stunning tribute to the baddest Jedi Council member to ever have his midi-chlorians counted! Featuring "The Secret of Tet-Ami" by Fabian Nicieza and Timothy II, "Children of the Force" by Jason Hall and Lucas Marangon, "The Sith in Shadow" by Bob Harris and Jerome Opena, and MUCH MORE! Featuring a cover by Tim Bradstreet!''

==Contents==
'''Introduction''': ''Star Wars Tales'' editor [[David Land|Dave Land]] introduces the issue and its focus on Mace Windu, who [[Gender/Legends|he]] calls "the most powerful [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] of all time," a claim disputed by [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]. Land counters with the fact that Yoda is merely a puppet, only to discover that he is now a digital creation. Yoda lowers Land's credit rating over the internet to prove his power.
*"[[Puzzle Peace]]"
*"[[The Secret of Tet-Ami]]"
*"[[Survivors (comic story)|Survivors]]"
*"[[Stones]]"
*"[[The Sith in the Shadow]]"
*"[[Children of the Force (comic story)|Children of the Force]]"
